reports.title: About this dashboard
reports.query:
## UAF Starter — orientation

Each page covers one UAF 1.2 domain plus a cross-cutting **Data / ERD** page.

| Page | What it shows | Parameters |
|---|---|---|
| **Overview** | counts by stereotype, domain, relationship type; most-connected elements | — |
| **Strategic** | capabilities, traceability, capability gaps | `$neodash_capability` |
| **Operational** | activities & performers, decommissioning impact, AS-IS / TO-BE | `$neodash_element`, `$neodash_domain` |
| **Resource** | resource architectures, hardware/software, performer→function | `$neodash_resource` |
| **Service** | services exposed, service interfaces, service exchanges | `$neodash_service` |
| **Personnel** | organisations, posts, posts realising capabilities | `$neodash_post` |
| **Acquisition** | projects, milestones, project-sequence dependencies | `$neodash_project` |
| **Security** | enclaves, dominance chain, security controls | `$neodash_enclave` |
| **Data / ERD** | entities, attributes, FK/PK breakdown | `$neodash_entity` |

Graph cards colour nodes by stereotype label using the `neodash` palette — hover any node to see its full property set.

reports.title: Element count by stereotype
reports.query:
MATCH (n) WHERE n.stereotype IS NOT NULL
RETURN n.stereotype AS Stereotype, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: Element count by domain
reports.query:
MATCH (n) WHERE n.stereotype IS NOT NULL
RETURN coalesce(n.domain, '(unset)') AS Domain, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

reports.title: Edge count by relationship type
reports.query:
MATCH ()-[r]->()
WHERE NOT type(r) IN ['INSTANCE_OF', 'BELONGS_TO']
RETURN type(r) AS RelType, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 30

reports.title: Top-15 most-connected elements (instance edges only)
reports.query:
MATCH (n) WHERE n.stereotype IS NOT NULL
WITH n, size([(n)-[r]-(m) WHERE m.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND NOT type(r) IN ['INSTANCE_OF','BELONGS_TO'] | m]) AS deg
ORDER BY deg DESC LIMIT 15
RETURN n.stereotype AS Stereotype, n.name AS Name, deg AS Connections, n.qualifiedName AS QualifiedName

reports.title: Show all capabilities
reports.query: MATCH (c:Capability) RETURN c LIMIT 200

reports.title: Capability traceability for $neodash_capability
reports.query: MATCH p = shortestPath((c:Capability {name: $neodash_capability})<-[:REALISES|EXHIBITS|IMPLEMENTS|PERFORMS*1..4]-(n)) WHERE n <> c RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: Performers realising $neodash_capability
reports.query: MATCH p = shortestPath((c:Capability {name: $neodash_capability})<-[:REALISES|EXHIBITS*1..3]-(rp)) WHERE rp <> c RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: Capability gap â€” capabilities with no realising performer
reports.query: MATCH (c:Capability) WHERE NOT EXISTS { (c)<-[:REALISES|EXHIBITS]-() } RETURN c.name AS Capability, c.qualifiedName AS QualifiedName ORDER BY Capability

reports.title: Operational activities and their performers
reports.query: MATCH (p)-[r:PERFORMS]->(a:OperationalActivity) RETURN p, r, a LIMIT 200

reports.title: Decommissioning impact for $neodash_element
reports.query: MATCH (e {name: $neodash_element}) WHERE e.stereotype IS NOT NULL MATCH p = shortestPath((e)<-[:REALISES|EXHIBITS|IMPLEMENTS|PERFORMS|DEPENDENCY|INFORMATION_FLOW|MESSAGE_FLOW|FLOWS_TO*1..5]-(n)) WHERE n <> e RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: AS-IS vs TO-BE elements in $neodash_domain
reports.query: MATCH (n)-[r:REALISES|EXHIBITS|IMPLEMENTS|PERFORMS|DEPENDENCY|INFORMATION_FLOW|MESSAGE_FLOW|FLOWS_TO]-(m) WHERE n.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND n.qualifiedName CONTAINS $neodash_domain AND (n.qualifiedName CONTAINS 'AS-IS' OR n.qualifiedName CONTAINS 'TO-BE') RETURN n, r, m LIMIT 200

reports.title: Resource architectures
reports.query: MATCH (a) WHERE a:ResourceArchitecture OR a:LogicalArchitecture OR a:PhysicalArchitecture RETURN a LIMIT 200

reports.title: Resource services
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n.stereotype IN ['ResourceService','ResourceServiceInterface'] RETURN n LIMIT 200

reports.title: Architecture connections for $neodash_resource
reports.query: MATCH (e {name: $neodash_resource})-[r]-(a:ResourceArchitecture) WHERE e.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND e <> a RETURN e, r, a LIMIT 200

reports.title: Pick a resource element by name
Resource neighbourhood for $neodash_resource
reports.query: MATCH (e {name: $neodash_resource}) WHERE e.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND e.domain = 'RESOURCE' MATCH p = (e)-[:CONNECTED_TO|INFORMATION_FLOW|FLOWS_TO|MESSAGE_FLOW|ALLOCATED_TO|EXPOSES|PROVIDES|PERFORMS|REALISES|EXHIBITS*1..3]-(n) WHERE n <> e RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: Resource exchanges from $neodash_resource
reports.query: MATCH path = (e {name: $neodash_resource})-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH|CONNECTED_TO|COMPOSED_OF|INFORMATION_FLOW*1..3]-(target) WHERE e <> target AND target.domain = 'RESOURCE' AND target.stereotype IN ['ResourceArchitecture','ResourcePerformer','ResourceArtifact','HardwareElement','SoftwareElement','System','Software','SystemBlock','Technology','ActualSystem','ResourceSystem'] AND ANY(n IN nodes(path) WHERE n.stereotype IN ['ResourceExchange','ResourceInformation']) RETURN path LIMIT 200

reports.title: Service specifications and interfaces
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n:ServiceSpecification OR n:ServiceInterface RETURN n LIMIT 200

reports.title: Service functions
reports.query: MATCH (f:ServiceFunction) RETURN f LIMIT 200

reports.title: Services exposed by performers
reports.query: MATCH (p)-[r:EXPOSES|PROVIDES]->(s) WHERE s:ServiceSpecification OR s:ServiceInterface OR s:ServiceFunction RETURN p, r, s LIMIT 200

reports.title: Pick a service element by name
Service neighbourhood for $neodash_service
reports.query: MATCH (e {name: $neodash_service}) WHERE e.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND e.domain = 'SERVICE' MATCH p = (e)-[:EXPOSES|PROVIDES|REALISES|IMPLEMENTS|CONNECTED_TO|INFORMATION_FLOW|MESSAGE_FLOW|FLOWS_TO|ASSOCIATED_WITH*1..3]-(n) WHERE n <> e RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: Organisations and posts
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n:Organization OR n:ActualOrganization OR n:Post OR n:OrganizationalResource RETURN n LIMIT 200

reports.title: Posts and the capabilities they realise
reports.query: MATCH (p:Post)-[r:REALISES|EXHIBITS]->(c:Capability) RETURN p, r, c LIMIT 200

reports.title: Responsibilities of $neodash_post
reports.query: MATCH (p:Post {name: $neodash_post}) MATCH q = (p)-[:PERFORMS|REALISES|EXHIBITS|ASSIGNED_TO|CONTAINED_IN|COMPOSED_OF*1..3]-(n) WHERE n <> p RETURN q LIMIT 200

reports.title: Projects and milestones
reports.query: MATCH (pr:Project) OPTIONAL MATCH (pr)-[r]-(m) WHERE m:Milestone OR m:ProjectMilestone RETURN pr, r, m LIMIT 200

reports.title: Milestone dependencies
reports.query: MATCH (a)-[r:DEPENDENCY|DEPENDS_ON|PRECEDES|TRIGGERS]->(b) WHERE a.stereotype IN ['Milestone','ProjectMilestone','MilestoneDependency'] OR b.stereotype IN ['Milestone','ProjectMilestone','MilestoneDependency'] RETURN a, r, b LIMIT 200

reports.title: Project context for $neodash_project
reports.query: MATCH (pr:Project {name: $neodash_project}) MATCH q = (pr)-[*1..3]-(n) WHERE n.stereotype IS NOT NULL AND n <> pr AND NONE(x IN nodes(q) WHERE x:SystemModel OR x:Stereotype OR x:Domain) RETURN q LIMIT 200

reports.title: Security domains, enclaves and controls
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n:SecurityDomain OR n:SecurityEnclave OR n:SecurityControl OR n:SecurityControlFamily RETURN n LIMIT 200

reports.title: Security dominance chain from $neodash_enclave
reports.query: MATCH p = shortestPath((e:SecurityEnclave {name: $neodash_enclave})-[:DOMINATES*1..5]->(d)) WHERE d <> e RETURN p LIMIT 200

reports.title: Controls protecting security assets
reports.query: MATCH (c) WHERE c:SecurityControl OR c:SecurityPolicy MATCH (c)-[r:SUPPORTS|IMPLEMENTS|SATISFIES|ENABLES|PROVIDES|ASSOCIATED_WITH]-(a) WHERE a:SecurityAsset OR a:SecurityRisk OR a:SecurityConstraint RETURN c, r, a LIMIT 200

reports.title: Entities (count by stereotype)
reports.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n.stereotype IN ['Entity','EntityRelationship','EntityRelation','Attribute','PrimaryKey','ForeignKey','AlternativeKey','FK','DataType'] RETURN n.stereotype AS Stereotype, count(*) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC

reports.title: Entities and their attributes
reports.query: MATCH (e:Entity)-[r:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(a) RETURN e, r, a LIMIT 200

reports.title: Entity-to-entity relationships
reports.query: MATCH (a:Entity)-[r:ASSOCIATED_WITH|DEPENDENCY|GENERALIZATION]-(b:Entity) RETURN a, r, b LIMIT 200

reports.title: Attributes and types of $neodash_entity
reports.query: MATCH (e:Entity {name: $neodash_entity})-[r:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(a) OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[t:OF_TYPE]->(dt) RETURN e, r, a, t, dt LIMIT 200
